arts.ttl: Conte Embraces Pressure as Napoli Chase Inter in Intense Scudetto Race
arts.sum: Napoli manager Antonio Conte embraces pressure amid Partenopei's relentless Serie A title battle against reigning holders Inter. Speaking at the press conference via TMW, Conte reiterated Napoli's unwavering desire to challenge the Nerazzurri for the Scudetto until the end. The post Conte Embraces Pressure as Napoli Chase Inter in Intense Scudetto Race appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
